name: Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Nevasa HMC CIP VII Global Securities II Fund
summary: Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Nevasa HMC CIP VII Global Securities II Fund is a global securities investment fund. It is managed by Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos and invests in securities worldwide.
